intel_overview.headline_zh: UPC诉讼激增与FRAND和解重塑欧洲IP格局
intel_overview.headline_en: UPC Litigation Surge and FRAND Settlements Reshape EU IP Landscape
intel_overview.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧洲IP生态呈现司法活跃与行政扩容并行的态势。统一专利法院（UPC）案件量创新高，PMAC替代性争议解决机制上线，标志着欧洲专利纠纷解决进入高效化新阶段。与此同时，EPO通过ISO审核及摩尔多瓦入盟，显示体系稳健扩张。司法端，CJEU在商标声誉评估及版权公平报酬上确立新标准，而SEP领域诺基亚、华为等巨头频繁达成全球和解，预示FRAND许可模式趋于成熟。整体而言，欧洲正从单纯的权利保护转向强调合规、效率与商业平衡的综合治理。
top_signals: UPC PMAC调解仲裁系统正式运行，提供低成本ADR新路径
摩尔多瓦成为EPO第40成员国，欧专保护版图进一步东扩
CJEU裁定出版者在线获酬权合法，强化数字内容版权壁垒
Nokia与吉利等车企达成5G专利全球和解，SEP许可常态化
cross_currents: 司法效率提升：UPC年报显示案件处理加速，配合PMAC机制，欧洲专利维权周期显著缩短，对快速迭代行业利好
合规门槛提高：CJEU关于商标欺骗性及GDPR价值观的判决，要求企业在品牌叙事和数据合规上需具备更高证据链支撑
市场整合深化：EUIPO与EIF合作解锁IP融资，以及Agorateka网络全覆盖，显示欧盟正系统性打通IP商业化与跨境流通堵点
implications: 善用UPC/PMAC机制：中国企业应评估利用PMAC调解降低跨国专利纠纷成本，避免陷入冗长诉讼
优化海外布局：关注摩尔多瓦入盟节点，及时调整“一站式”欧专申请策略以覆盖新兴市场
强化合规审查：出口欧洲需严格审查品牌历史宣传真实性及数据隐私政策，防范因违反欧盟基本权利或误导公众导致的法律风险
watchlist: 英国高等法院在Huawei v TP-Link案中的FRAND费率裁决及其全球示范效应
EUIPO与EIF合作的具体落地措施及首批IP支持型融资案例
瑞士新专利法实质审查制度实施后的审查标准变化及对中国申请人的影响

daily_report.headline_zh: UPC诉讼策略调整与SEP和解潮
daily_report.headline_en: SEP Settlements Rise as UPC ADR Mechanisms Expand and UK Clarifies Distribution Rules
daily_report.executive_line: 本周核心在于SEP持有人（诺基亚、华为）转向和解或聚焦英国FRAND费率，同时UPC通过ADR机制强化争议解决能力，显示欧洲IP诉讼从单纯侵权对抗向商业许可...
daily_report.summary_zh: 过去48小时，欧洲IP战局呈现两大趋势：一是标准必要专利（SEP）领域出现显著和解信号，诺基亚撤回对吉利诉讼并达成全球和解，华为将焦点集中于英国高等法院的FRAND费率裁定；二是统一专利法院（UPC）运营深化，发布2025年度回顾并明确替代性争议解决（ADR）机制运作细节。此外，EPO维持ISO认证保障服务稳定性，英国上诉法院就选择性分销在线限制提供新指引。整体态势表明，权利人更倾向于通过高效程序和商业谈判解决纠纷，而非长期缠斗。

storylines.title_zh: SEP巨头转向和解与费率裁定
storylines.what_happened_zh: 诺基亚撤回对吉利诉讼并达成全球5G和解；华为撤回部分侵权索赔，聚焦英国FRAND费率程序。
storylines.why_it_matters_zh: 标志SEP诉讼策略从广泛侵权打击转向精准费率博弈，英国法院成为全球许可定价关键枢纽。

storylines.title_en: SEP Holders Pivot to Settlements and Rate Determinations
storylines.what_happened_en: Nokia settled its global 5G dispute with Geely, withdrawing Munich litigation. Huawei dropped UPC and Munich claims against TP-Link to focus exclusively on UK FRAND rate proceedings.
storylines.why_it_matters_en: This marks a strategic shift from broad infringement enforcement to precise FRAND rate bargaining, establishing the UK courts as a central hub for global licensing valuation and reducing multi-jurisdictional friction.

storylines.title_en: UK Court Clarifies Online Sales Restrictions in Selective Distribution
storylines.what_happened_en: The UK Court of Appeal ruled that restricting authorized retailers from selling on unbranded discount websites does not inherently breach competition law, overturning previous tribunal findings.
storylines.why_it_matters_en: Brands must now document objective criteria for selective distribution models to justify channel restrictions, balancing brand image protection with antitrust compliance without facing automatic illegality findings.

storylines.what_happened_en: The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC), operating within the UPC framework, clarified its independent role in handling mediation and arbitration for patent disputes in Ljubljana and Lisbon.
storylines.why_it_matters_en: Parties can now leverage parallel or independent ADR procedures for mixed IP portfolios, offering a faster, potentially lower-cost alternative to full UPC litigation for resolving complex patent conflicts.

storylines.what_happened_en: Senior EUIPO officials stated that the current IP legal framework faces unprecedented pressure from AI-generated content and online enforcement challenges, necessitating significant systemic adaptation.
storylines.why_it_matters_en: While specific policy updates are pending, this acknowledgment signals future regulatory shifts regarding AI and digital enforcement, requiring rights holders to monitor evolving compliance standards closely.

report_items.title_zh: EPO成功完成ISO监督审核
report_items.title_en: EPO Maintains ISO Certifications Following Successful Surveillance Audit
report_items.title: EPO successfully completes ISO surveillance audit
report_items.summary_zh: 2026年4月，欧洲专利局（EPO）顺利通过外部审计机构的管理体系ISO监督审核。此次审核确认了EPO在质量管理、职业健康安全、信息安全和环境管理方面的稳健性，维持了其ISO 9001、ISO 45001、ISO 27001及ISO 14001认证。这体现了EPO对国际标准及合规性的承诺，并通过综合管理体系支持高质量服务交付。
report_items.summary_en: In April 2026, the European Patent Office (EPO) successfully completed its periodic ISO surveillance audit conducted by external auditors. The review confirmed the continued robustness and maturity of the EPO’s integrated management systems, allowing the organization to maintain its certifications for quality management (ISO 9001), occupational health and safety (ISO 45001), information security (ISO 27001), and environmental management (ISO 14001). This outcome underscores the EPO’s adherence to international standards and regulatory compliance. By aligning policies, processes, and controls w...
core_points_zh: EPO于2026年4月通过外部审计机构的ISO管理体系监督审核
维持ISO 9001、45001、27001及14001四项国际认证，确认体系成熟稳健
通过综合管理体系整合政策流程，确保持续改进及服务交付质量
core_points_en: The EPO passed its April 2026 external ISO surveillance audit, confirming ongoing adherence to international management standards.
Certifications maintained include ISO 9001 for quality, ISO 27001 for information security, ISO 45001 for safety, and ISO 14001 for environment.
The EPO utilizes an Integrated Management System to unify policies and controls, supporting service quality and continuous operational improvement.
report_items.insight_zh: 此新闻属于EPO内部行政与合规动态，不直接改变专利实体法或审查标准。实务中需关注其信息安全（ISO 27001）与质量管理（ISO 9001）的持续合规，这间接保障了电子提交系统及审查流程的稳定性与数据安全性，是评估EPO服务可靠性的基础指标。
report_items.insight_en: This update confirms the administrative and operational stability of the EPO rather than introducing changes to substantive patent law or examination guidelines. For rights holders and legal practitioners, the maintenance of ISO 27001 and ISO 9001 certifications serves as a key indicator of the reliability and data security standards underpinning the EPO’s electronic filing systems and procedural workflows. While thi...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性: EPO运营稳定性与数据安全合规性保障
Practice note/实务观察: 关注EPO管理体系认证状态对服务连续性的影响
What to monitor/后续观察: 无具体法律变动，仅需知悉机构合规状态更新
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Confirms the stability and data security compliance of EPO operations, indirectly supporting the reliability of electronic submission channels and case processin…
Practice note: Monitor the status of EPO management system certifications as baseline indicators for service continuity and operational maturity.
What to monitor: No immediate legal or procedural changes; treat as routine compliance confirmation regarding institutional operational standards.

report_items.title_zh: 欧盟资助IP合作扩展至西巴尔干地区
report_items.title_en: EUIPO Launches EU-Funded IP Cooperation Project in Western Balkans
report_items.title: EU-funded IP cooperation expands into the Western Balkans
report_items.summary_zh: 原文摘要显示，一项新的欧盟资助合作项目正在与扩大伙伴国开展，旨在支持这些国家在加入欧盟之前实现知识产权标准的对齐。该项目由欧盟知识产权局（EUIPO）发布，聚焦于通过合作促进法律与实践的协调，为未来的欧盟成员资格做准备。
report_items.summary_en: The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) has announced a new cooperation project funded by the European Union. This initiative targets enlargement partners in the Western Balkans, aiming to support the alignment of their intellectual property standards with those of the European Union. The project serves as a preparatory measure for these countries ahead of potential future EU accession.
core_points_zh: 标题显示欧盟资助的新合作项目已扩展至西巴尔干地区
原文摘要显示项目旨在支持伙伴国在入盟前对齐欧盟知识产权标准
core_points_en: A new EU-funded cooperation project targets enlargement partners in the Western Balkans region.
The initiative focuses on aligning local intellectual property standards with European Union frameworks.
The project supports regulatory harmonization efforts preceding potential EU accession.
report_items.insight_zh: Practice note / What to monitor：需持续观察该合作项目的具体实施范围、涵盖的知识产权领域（如商标、专利或外观设计）以及具体的时间表。鉴于正文信息有限，目前仅能确认其为入盟前的标准对齐举措，尚无法评估对特定行业权利人的直接影响。
report_items.insight_en: This development highlights ongoing regulatory convergence efforts between the EU and candidate countries. For rights holders operating across Europe, monitoring the implementation of these alignment measures is relevant for understanding future market entry conditions and enforcement landscapes in the Western Balkans. The focus remains on legislative and administrative harmonization rather than immediate procedural...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性
Practice note/实务观察
What to monitor/后续观察
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders should track regulatory alignment in the Western Balkans to anticipate future market integration and enforcement environments.
Practice note: The project emphasizes pre-accession standard alignment, indicating long-term legislative harmonization goals for IP systems in the region.
What to monitor: Specific timelines, covered IP sectors, and detailed implementation steps of the cooperation project remain to be defined.

report_items.title_zh: UPC替代性争议解决：仲裁、调解与专家裁决
report_items.title_en: UPC ADR Mechanisms: Scope of PMAC Arbitration, Mediation and Expert Determination
report_items.title: UPC ADR: Arbitration, Mediation And Expert Determination
report_items.summary_zh: 专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）作为统一专利法院（UPC）的一部分，在斯洛文尼亚卢布尔雅那和葡萄牙里斯本设有席位。其运作独立但与UPC机构紧密合作。PMAC旨在促进涉及UPC管辖权范围内的专利纠纷的替代性争议解决（ADR），包括具有事实、法律或商业联系的“相关纠纷”。当事人可选择单独或与UPC诉讼并行进行ADR程序。
report_items.summary_en: The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC), operating independently within the Unified Patent Court (UPC) framework, facilitates alternative dispute resolution for patent matters. With seats in Ljubljana and Lisbon, PMAC handles proceedings separately or in parallel with UPC litigation. Its jurisdiction extends to disputes involving European patents, unitary patents, and supplementary protection certificates, as well as related IP or commercial disputes sharing a factual, legal, or commercial nexus with UPC-competent cases. This structure allows parties to address broader portfolio iss...
core_points_zh: PMAC是UPC组成部分，设在斯洛文尼亚和葡萄牙，运作独立但与UPC机构紧密合作
ADR程序可单独进行或与UPC诉讼并行，适用于UPC拥有部分管辖权的专利及相关纠纷
“相关纠纷”涵盖与欧洲专利或补充保护证书有事实、法律或商业联系的其他IP或商业争议
core_points_en: PMAC operates independently but cooperates closely with UPC bodies, offering mediation and arbitration services from its seats in Slovenia and Portugal.
ADR proceedings may be conducted separately or in parallel with UPC litigation, provided a connection exists to UPC jurisdiction.
Scope includes 'related disputes' involving other patents or IP rights that share a factual, legal, or commercial nexus with UPC-competent cases.
report_items.insight_zh: 实务中需关注PMAC规则对UPC诉讼策略的影响。当纠纷涉及未选择退出的欧洲专利或单元专利时，当事人可考虑利用PMAC进行并行或独立的ADR程序，以可能更高效地解决包含非UPC管辖专利在内的关联争议。
report_items.insight_en: For rights holders managing European portfolios, PMAC offers a structured avenue to resolve complex, multi-jurisdictional IP conflicts efficiently. The ability to handle related non-UPC disputes alongside UPC matters provides strategic flexibility in settlement negotiations. Legal teams should evaluate how integrating PMAC processes might streamline resolution for portfolios containing both opted-out and unitary pate...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性
Practice note/实务观察
What to monitor/后续观察
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Enables efficient resolution of mixed IP portfolios by addressing UPC-competent and related non-UPC disputes in a single forum.
Practice note: Parties can initiate PMAC proceedings independently or concurrently with UPC actions, allowing for flexible procedural strategies.
What to monitor: Developments in PMAC case law and procedural rules to assess effectiveness in resolving cross-border patent and commercial nexus disputes.

report_items.title_zh: UPC官方2025年度回顾：五大亮点解析
report_items.title_en: UPC Annual Review 2025: Five Key Highlights from the Court's Second Official Report
report_items.title: Official UPC Year in Review – Five highlights from 2025
report_items.summary_zh: Bristows律所发布分析，解读统一专利法院（UPC）发布的2025年官方年度回顾报告。该报告是UPC的第二份年度报告，全面梳理了2025年的机构活动、案件趋势及运营发展。文章从中提炼出五个对UPC用户至关重要的亮点，旨在帮助利益相关者更好地理解UPC的最新动态与司法实践走向，为在欧专利诉讼策略提供参考依据。
report_items.summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) has published its second official Annual Review, detailing institutional activity, case trends, and operational developments throughout 2025. Bristows analyzes this report, extracting five specific highlights deemed most relevant for UPC users. This overview provides essential context on the court's evolving practices and statistical performance during its second full year of operation.
core_points_zh: UPC发布第二份官方年度回顾，全面展示2025年机构活动与案件趋势
报告详细分析了UPC的运营发展状况，为法律从业者提供关键数据支持
文章提炼五大核心亮点，聚焦对UPC用户最具参考价值的实务动态
core_points_en: The UPC released its second Annual Review, offering a comprehensive statistical and operational overview of the court's activities in 2025.
Bristows identifies five key highlights from the report that provide critical insights into current case trends and procedural developments.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This annual review serves as a primary reference for understanding the UPC's operational trajectory and judicial tendencies. Rights holders and legal teams should examine these highlights to align their European patent enforcement expectations with the court's actual caseload management and procedural evolution.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: The report offers data-driven insights into UPC activity levels, helping rights holders contextualize litigation timelines and court capacity.
Practice note: Legal practitioners should review the identified highlights to stay updated on emerging procedural norms and case management trends within the UPC.
What to monitor: Future updates to the UPC's annual reporting will likely continue to shape expectations regarding case volume distribution and operational efficiency.

report_items.summary_zh: 英国上诉法院在Deckers诉Up & Running案中裁定，品牌方禁止授权零售商在未品牌折扣网站销售不违反竞争法，推翻竞争上诉法庭原判。法院确认此类在线限制需结合法律与经济背景评估损害程度，而非自动违法。此举虽未放松对转售价格维持等核心限制的执法，但强调品牌应建立透明、客观的分销标准以规避诉讼风险。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Court of Appeal overturned a Competition Appeal Tribunal ruling, holding that Deckers did not breach competition law by preventing an authorised retailer from selling on an unbranded discount website. The judgment confirms that restrictions on online channels within selective distribution systems are not automatically illegal. Instead, they require a careful assessment of legal and economic context to establish a sufficient degree of harm, aligning with established case law such as Coty. While this clarifies the treatment of channel restrictions, it does not signal leniency towards hard...
core_points_zh: 在线销售限制非自动违法，需个案评估法律经济背景及损害程度
上诉法院推翻初审判决，支持品牌方管控未品牌折扣渠道的合规性
企业应避免价格固定等核心限制，通过透明标准降低反垄断诉讼风险
core_points_en: Restrictions on online sales channels in selective distribution are not presumed illegal but require contextual analysis of harm.
The Court of Appeal ruled that banning sales on unbranded discount websites by authorised retailers does not inherently breach competition law.
Hardcore restrictions such as resale price maintenance and blanket online bans remain strictly prohibited under current enforcement standards.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国出口欧洲的品牌商需警惕选择性分销中的在线限制合规性。建议避免直接禁止线上销售或固定价格，转而制定基于品牌形象和防止搭便车的客观准入标准。完善合同条款与证据留存，可有效应对潜在的反垄断调查与民事诉讼，保障供应链稳定。
report_items.insight_en: This decision provides important clarity for brands operating selective distribution networks in the UK and EU. It reinforces that channel architecture controls can be lawful if justified by brand positioning or network integrity, rather than being treated as per se violations. However, rights holders must distinguish these legitimate quality controls from hardcore anti-competitive practices. Maintaining transparent...
insight_points_zh: 制定基于品牌定位的客观分销标准，避免 blanket ban 线上销售
严禁转售价格维持等核心限制，完善合规文档以应对反垄断审查
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands can defend channel restrictions by demonstrating they protect brand image and prevent free-riding, avoiding automatic illegality findings.
Practice note: Document transparent, objective criteria for selective distribution models, specifically regarding website standards and third-party marketplace usage.
What to monitor: Continued enforcement actions against resale price maintenance and online sales restrictions by the European Commission and national competition authorities.

report_items.title_zh: 瑞士通过专利法修订引入实质审查制度
report_items.title_en: Switzerland Reforms Patent Act with Mandatory Searches and Optional Substantive Examination
report_items.title: Switzerland introduces substantive examinations with Patent Act reform
report_items.summary_zh: 2024年3月，瑞士联邦议会通过《专利法》部分修订案。此次改革核心在于引入强制性的现有技术检索，并允许申请人选择是否进行全面的实质审查。此外，新规接受英文技术文件，并建立了新的上诉系统。这一变革标志着瑞士从形式审查向更严格的审查模式转变，旨在提升专利质量与法律确定性，对在该国进行专利布局的企业将产生深远影响。
report_items.summary_en: In March 2024, the Swiss Federal Assembly passed a partial revision of the Patent Act, introducing significant procedural changes. Key amendments include the implementation of a mandatory prior-art search and an optional full substantive examination system. The reform also allows for the acceptance of English-language technical documents and establishes a new appeal mechanism. These measures mark a shift towards enhanced patent quality and legal certainty within the Swiss jurisdiction.
core_points_zh: 瑞士联邦议会于2024年3月通过《专利法》部分修订案
引入强制性现有技术检索及可选的全面实质审查机制
接受英文技术文档并建立全新的专利上诉系统
core_points_en: The revised Swiss Patent Act introduces a mandatory prior-art search requirement for all patent applications filed in Switzerland.
Applicants may now opt for a full substantive examination, moving beyond the previous formal examination framework.
The reform permits the submission of English-language technical documents and implements a new appellate structure.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业赴瑞士申请专利需适应新流程，强制检索可能增加前期成本与时间。建议提前规划现有技术分析，利用英文文件便利降低翻译成本。同时，关注实质审查的可选性，根据商业价值权衡投入，以应对更高的授权门槛和潜在的驳回风险。
report_items.insight_en: This legislative update alters the procedural landscape for patent registration in Switzerland. Rights holders should note the introduction of mandatory searches and the option for substantive review, which may impact prosecution timelines and grant probabilities. The acceptance of English documentation offers potential administrative efficiencies for international applicants managing European portfolios.
insight_points_zh: 适应强制检索要求，优化前期现有技术分析与预算规划
善用英文文件政策降低成本，审慎评估实质审查的商业必要性
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor how the optional substantive examination affects grant rates and portfolio strength in the Swiss market.
Practice note: Leverage the new allowance for English-language technical documents to streamline filing procedures where applicable.
What to monitor: Track the implementation timeline and specific guidelines for the newly established appeal system.

report_items.title_zh: 华为与TP-Link FRAND战事聚焦英国高等法院
report_items.title_en: Huawei Withdraws UPC and Munich Claims, Focuses FRAND Dispute with TP-Link on UK High Court
report_items.title: FRAND battle between Huawei and TP-Link now focused at UK High Court
report_items.summary_zh: 华为已撤回在统一专利法院（UPC）和慕尼黑地区法院对TP-Link的侵权索赔，争议焦点现集中于英国高等法院的FRAND费率设定程序。此前英国法官Richard Meade已裁定临时许可费率。华为于2025年夏季在UPC慕尼黑分部及慕尼黑地方法院提起诉讼，同时在中国法院起诉TP-Link。
report_items.summary_en: Huawei has withdrawn its patent infringement claims against TP-Link at the Unified Patent Court (UPC) and the Munich Regional Court. The dispute concerning Wi-Fi 6 technology now centers exclusively on FRAND rate-setting proceedings at the UK High Court. This strategic shift follows a recent determination by UK High Court Judge Richard Meade regarding an interim licence rate. Huawei had originally initiated litigation in summer 2025 at the UPC Local Division in Munich and the Munich Regional Court, alongside parallel actions in Chinese courts. The withdrawal is described as a logical step foll...
core_points_zh: 华为撤回UPC及慕尼黑地方法院侵权索赔，案件聚焦英国FRAND费率程序
英国高等法院法官Richard Meade已确定针对Wi-Fi 6技术的临时许可费率
华为于2025年夏在UPC慕尼黑分部及中国法院对TP-Link提起相关诉讼
core_points_en: Huawei withdrew infringement claims against TP-Link at the UPC and Munich Regional Court after UK interim FRAND rate determination.
The dispute over Wi-Fi 6 technology now focuses solely on FRAND rate-setting proceedings at the UK High Court.
Huawei initially sued TP-Link in summer 2025 at UPC Munich and Munich Regional Court, with parallel actions in China.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案显示SEP权利人策略性调整诉讼阵地，利用英国法院确定的临时费率作为杠杆，退出大陆法域以集中资源。实务中需关注英国FRAND最终裁决对全球许可谈判的示范效应，以及UPC撤诉后权利人在其他法域的并行诉讼策略变化。
report_items.insight_en: This development illustrates how SEP holders may consolidate multi-jurisdictional enforcement efforts around jurisdictions offering decisive interim rate determinations. By withdrawing continental European infringement actions after securing a UK interim rate, rights holders can streamline litigation resources while maintaining leverage through ongoing global proceedings. For implementers and legal teams, this highli...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性: SEP持有人可参考此策略优化多法域诉讼…
Practice note/实务观察: 英国FRAND裁决对全球许可谈判具有显著风向标…
What to monitor/后续观察: 需监控英国法院最终费率裁定及中国法院诉讼进展
insight_points_en: Client relevance: SEP holders may prioritize jurisdictions providing early interim rate decisions to streamline multi-forum litigation strategies.
Practice note: Withdrawal of infringement claims in one jurisdiction can follow favorable interim rate determinations in another key forum.
What to monitor: The final FRAND rate determination by the UK High Court and progress of parallel proceedings in Chinese courts.

report_items.title: Nokia withdraws action against Geely in connected cars dispute

report_items.summary_en: The Munich Regional Court has confirmed that Nokia withdrew its patent infringement lawsuit against Geely, which was scheduled for an oral hearing on May 21, 2026. The action concerned two European patents essential to 4G and 5G standards (EP 3 566 488 and EP 3 832 976) used in connected vehicles. This withdrawal follows a series of infringement claims filed by Nokia in Munich and at the Unified Patent Court (UPC) since mid-2025. The discontinuation of the Munich proceedings suggests that parallel actions at the UPC may also be approaching an early conclusion, potentially signaling a shift in...
core_points_zh: 慕尼黑地区法院确认诺基亚撤回针对吉利的侵权诉讼，原定庭审取消
涉案专利为EP 3 566 488和EP 3 832 976，涉及4G/5G标准必要专利
该撤诉行为可能导致相关的统一专利法院（UPC）程序提前终结
core_points_en: Nokia formally withdrew its infringement claim against Geely at the Munich Regional Court just before the scheduled oral hearing.
The dispute centered on two standard-essential patents, EP 3 566 488 and EP 3 832 976, relevant to 4G and 5G connectivity in automobiles.
This development may lead to the premature termination of related parallel proceedings currently pending before the Unified Patent Court.

report_items.insight_en: For rights holders and implementers in the automotive sector, this withdrawal highlights the volatility of SEP enforcement strategies. While the specific Munich case is closed, parties should assess whether this reflects broader settlement trends or tactical repositioning across jurisdictions. Monitoring the status of associated UPC filings remains critical for understanding the trajectory of connected car IP dispute...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性: 关注SEP持有人诉讼策略变化对车联网行…
Practice note/实务观察: 撤诉可能导致关联UPC案件程序性终结，需核实案…
What to monitor/后续观察: 监测诺基亚在其他司法管辖区的平行诉讼进展及…

Practice note: Practitioners must verify the procedural status of any linked UPC cases, as a national withdrawal often influences parallel unitary patent proceedings.
What to monitor: Track whether Nokia pursues similar SEP assertions against other vehicle makers in Germany or other key European markets.

report_items.title: IP system must adapt to survive, say EUIPO leaders
report_items.summary_zh: 原文摘要显示，欧洲顶级知识产权官员指出，从人工智能生成内容到在线执法纠纷，现有的法律框架正面临前所未有的考验。EUIPO领导层强调IP系统必须适应这些挑战才能生存。由于正文材料仅为摘要片段，未提供具体适应措施或详细政策细节。
report_items.summary_en: Senior officials at the European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) have stated that the existing intellectual property legal framework is facing unprecedented pressure. The challenges stem primarily from the rise of artificial intelligence-generated content and complex disputes regarding online enforcement, necessitating significant adaptation for the system's continued viability.

report_items.title_zh: 兰博基尼揭秘保护超跑机密的设计权争夺战
report_items.title_en: Lamborghini Legal Head Addresses New Threats to Supercar Design Protection
report_items.title: Lamborghini reveals the hidden race to protect supercar secrecy
report_items.summary_zh: 原文摘要显示，兰博基尼法务负责人正应对设计保护面临的新威胁，包括间谍照片、AI生成图像以及欧盟的维修条款（repair clause）。文章主要探讨这些新兴因素对超级跑车外观设计保密性及法律保护构成的挑战。
report_items.summary_en: The head of legal at Lamborghini has highlighted emerging challenges to design protection in the automotive sector. Key concerns include the proliferation of spy shots and AI-generated images, which threaten the secrecy of new vehicle launches. Additionally, the EU's repair clause is identified as a significant legal factor impacting the scope of design rights for spare parts and visible components.
core_points_zh: 兰博基尼法务负责人指出间谍照片和AI生成图像构成设计保护新威胁
欧盟维修条款（repair clause）被视为影响外观设计保护的关键法律因素之一
core_points_en: Spy shots and AI-generated images are cited as new threats compromising supercar design secrecy.
The EU repair clause is recognized as a critical legal element affecting design protection scope.
report_items.insight_zh: 实务观察：需关注欧盟维修条款在具体司法实践中的适用边界，以及AI生成内容对现有外观设计新颖性判断标准的潜在冲击。后续应监测兰博基尼及相关车企在应对此类非传统侵权手段时的具体合规策略与诉讼动向。
report_items.insight_en: This commentary highlights the intersection of technological disruption and evolving EU design law. For rights holders, understanding how non-traditional disclosures like AI imagery interact with novelty requirements is essential. The mention of the repair clause underscores the need to monitor legislative impacts on component-level protection.
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性
Practice note/实务观察
What to monitor/后续观察

Practice note: Monitor the application of the EU repair clause to determine its effect on protected spare parts.
What to monitor: Future enforcement actions or policy updates concerning AI-generated visual content and design rights.

daily_report.executive_line_en: Rights holders are pivoting from broad infringement litigation to targeted FRAND rate-setting and alternative dispute resolution, signaling a strategic shift toward efficient commercial licensing and procedural optimizat...
daily_report.summary_en: Over the past 48 hours, the European IP landscape has been defined by two major trends. First, Standard Essential Patent (SEP) holders, including Nokia and Huawei, have shifted strategies away from widespread infringement actions toward global settlements and focused FRAND rate determinations in the UK High Court. This indicates a preference for precise economic outcomes over prolonged legal battles. Second, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) is deepening its operational capabilities, highlighted by the release of its 2025 Annual Review and the formalization of Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR) mechanisms through the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC). Additionally, the EPO maintained its ISO certifications, ensuring service stability, while the UK Court of Appeal provided new guidance on online restrictions within selective distribution systems. These developments collectively suggest that rights holders are increasingly prioritizing efficient procedural pathways and commercial negotiations to resolve disputes, rather than engaging in long-term adversarial litigation.
what_changed_vs_last_window_en: Nokia and Geely reached a global settlement, temporarily cooling heated SEP litigation in the connected car sector.
The UPC clarified the scope of its ADR procedures, providing litigants with viable alternatives to traditional court proceedings.
next_watch_72h_en: Further developments in the UK High Court regarding interim FRAND rates for Wi-Fi 6 technology.
Potential policy updates from EUIPO addressing enforcement strategies for AI-generated content.

Impact of EPO management system certifications on patent application processing timelines.
quick_takeaways_en: Strategic litigation is moving towards targeted rate-setting rather than broad injunctions.
Alternative dispute resolution is becoming a core component of the UPC ecosystem.
Compliance documentation is critical for defending selective distribution models in the UK.
regional_shift_en: Increased reliance on UK courts for global FRAND valuation
Centralization of patent mediation within the UPC framework
strategic_implications_en: Litigation costs may decrease as parties opt for ADR and focused rate hearings.
Brand owners need robust compliance frameworks for online channel management.
AI-related IP challenges will likely drive future regulatory adaptations at EUIPO.

weekly_report.headline_en: UPC Evidence Standards Clarified as SEP Litigation Shifts to Settlement
weekly_report.executive_line: 本周UPC证据保全门槛明确，英国FRAND费率成全球风向标；诺基亚等巨头密集和解，显示SEP诉讼策略从对抗转向合规谈判。
weekly_report.summary_zh: 欧洲IP生态呈现“司法精细化”与“商业和解化”双重趋势。UPC通过判例确立证据保全四项条件，提升维权可预测性；英国法院在FRAND及反垄断领域持续输出关键指引。同时，诺基亚、华为等SEP持有者密集达成和解或撤诉，反映许可谈判进入实质阶段。此外，瑞士引入专利实质审查，欧盟强化西巴尔干IP标准对齐，制度环境进一步收紧。企业需重点关注英国FRAND裁决对全球费率的锚定效应，并优化跨境许可合规策略。

storylines.what_happened_zh: 诺基亚撤回对吉利诉讼并达成全球5G和解；华为聚焦英国FRAND费率程序。
storylines.why_it_matters_zh: 标志车联网SEP战事进入费率确定期，英国法院裁决将成为全球许可谈判关键基准。

report_items.title_zh: EUIPO公布DesignEuropa奖终身成就奖得主及决赛选手

This announcement coincides with the tenth anniversary of the awards program, which aims to highlight the importance of design and intellectual property protection within the European Union. The EUIPO published the list of finalists alongside the lifetime achievement award recipient.

report_items.summary_en: In April 2026, the European Patent Office (EPO) successfully completed its periodic ISO surveillance audit conducted by external auditors. The review confirmed the continued robustness and maturity of the EPO’s integrated management systems, allowing the organization to maintain its certifications for quality management (ISO 9001), occupational health and safety (ISO 45001), information security (ISO 27001), and environmental management (ISO 14001). This outcome underscores the EPO’s adherence to international standards and regulatory compliance. By aligning policies, processes, and controls w...
core_points_zh: EPO于2026年4月通过外部审计机构的ISO管理体系监督审核
维持ISO 9001、45001、27001及14001四项国际认证，确认体系成熟稳健
通过综合管理体系整合政策流程，确保持续改进及服务交付质量
core_points_en: The EPO passed its April 2026 external ISO surveillance audit, confirming ongoing adherence to international management standards.
Certifications maintained include ISO 9001 for quality, ISO 27001 for information security, ISO 45001 for safety, and ISO 14001 for environment.
The EPO utilizes an Integrated Management System to unify policies and controls, supporting service quality and continuous operational improvement.
report_items.insight_zh: 此新闻属于EPO内部行政与合规动态，不直接改变专利实体法或审查标准。实务中需关注其信息安全（ISO 27001）与质量管理（ISO 9001）的持续合规，这间接保障了电子提交系统及审查流程的稳定性与数据安全性，是评估EPO服务可靠性的基础指标。
report_items.insight_en: This update confirms the administrative and operational stability of the EPO rather than introducing changes to substantive patent law or examination guidelines. For rights holders and legal practitioners, the maintenance of ISO 27001 and ISO 9001 certifications serves as a key indicator of the reliability and data security standards underpinning the EPO’s electronic filing systems and procedural workflows. While thi...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性: EPO运营稳定性与数据安全合规性保障
Practice note/实务观察: 关注EPO管理体系认证状态对服务连续性的影响
What to monitor/后续观察: 无具体法律变动，仅需知悉机构合规状态更新
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Confirms the stability and data security compliance of EPO operations, indirectly supporting the reliability of electronic submission channels and case processin…
Practice note: Monitor the status of EPO management system certifications as baseline indicators for service continuity and operational maturity.

report_items.title_zh: UPC替代性争议解决：仲裁、调解与专家裁决
report_items.title_en: UPC ADR Mechanisms: Scope of PMAC Arbitration, Mediation and Expert Determination
report_items.title: UPC ADR: Arbitration, Mediation And Expert Determination
report_items.summary_zh: 专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）作为统一专利法院（UPC）的一部分，在斯洛文尼亚卢布尔雅那和葡萄牙里斯本设有席位。其运作独立但与UPC机构紧密合作。PMAC旨在促进涉及UPC管辖权范围内的专利纠纷的替代性争议解决（ADR），包括具有事实、法律或商业联系的“相关纠纷”。当事人可选择单独或与UPC诉讼并行进行ADR程序。
report_items.summary_en: The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC), operating independently within the Unified Patent Court (UPC) framework, facilitates alternative dispute resolution for patent matters. With seats in Ljubljana and Lisbon, PMAC handles proceedings separately or in parallel with UPC litigation. Its jurisdiction extends to disputes involving European patents, unitary patents, and supplementary protection certificates, as well as related IP or commercial disputes sharing a factual, legal, or commercial nexus with UPC-competent cases. This structure allows parties to address broader portfolio iss...
core_points_zh: PMAC是UPC组成部分，设在斯洛文尼亚和葡萄牙，运作独立但与UPC机构紧密合作
ADR程序可单独进行或与UPC诉讼并行，适用于UPC拥有部分管辖权的专利及相关纠纷
“相关纠纷”涵盖与欧洲专利或补充保护证书有事实、法律或商业联系的其他IP或商业争议
core_points_en: PMAC operates independently but cooperates closely with UPC bodies, offering mediation and arbitration services from its seats in Slovenia and Portugal.
ADR proceedings may be conducted separately or in parallel with UPC litigation, provided a connection exists to UPC jurisdiction.
Scope includes 'related disputes' involving other patents or IP rights that share a factual, legal, or commercial nexus with UPC-competent cases.
report_items.insight_zh: 实务中需关注PMAC规则对UPC诉讼策略的影响。当纠纷涉及未选择退出的欧洲专利或单元专利时，当事人可考虑利用PMAC进行并行或独立的ADR程序，以可能更高效地解决包含非UPC管辖专利在内的关联争议。
report_items.insight_en: For rights holders managing European portfolios, PMAC offers a structured avenue to resolve complex, multi-jurisdictional IP conflicts efficiently. The ability to handle related non-UPC disputes alongside UPC matters provides strategic flexibility in settlement negotiations. Legal teams should evaluate how integrating PMAC processes might streamline resolution for portfolios containing both opted-out and unitary pate...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性
Practice note/实务观察
What to monitor/后续观察
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Enables efficient resolution of mixed IP portfolios by addressing UPC-competent and related non-UPC disputes in a single forum.
Practice note: Parties can initiate PMAC proceedings independently or concurrently with UPC actions, allowing for flexible procedural strategies.
What to monitor: Developments in PMAC case law and procedural rules to assess effectiveness in resolving cross-border patent and commercial nexus disputes.

report_items.title_zh: UPC海牙分部：证据保全令需满足四项累积条件
report_items.title_en: UPC Hague: Evidence Production Orders Require Cumulative Conditions and Proportionality
report_items.title: LD The Hague, May 11, 2026, Order, UPC-CFI_478/2025, UPC_CFI_585/2026
report_items.summary_zh: UPC海牙地方法院裁定，依据《程序规则》第190条及《统一专利法院协定》第59(1)条，发布证据保全令需满足四项累积条件：初步证据、对方控制下的特定证据、保密保护及比例原则。法院援引Winnow v Orbisk等先例，指出已授权欧洲专利具有有效性推定，除非明显无效。鉴于侵权验证需物理测试，法院批准获取部分产品样本及营销材料，但基于比例原则缩减了样本数量。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Local Division in The Hague clarified the requirements for evidence production orders under Rule 190 of the Rules of Procedure and Article 59(1) of the Unified Patent Court Agreement. The Court established that four cumulative conditions must be met: plausible evidence, specified evidence within the opposing party's control, confidentiality protection, and proportionality. Citing Winnow v Orbisk and Oppo v Panasonic, the judgment affirmed that granted European patents carry a presumption of validity, which is only displaced by clear-cut invalidity. The Court reduced the requested physi...
core_points_zh: 证据保全令需满足初步证据、特定性、保密性及比例原则四项累积条件
已授权欧洲专利享有有效性推定，仅明显无效情形可推翻该推定
为验证依赖测试的侵权，可下令提供物理样本，但需符合比例原则限制范围
core_points_en: Rule 190 RoP and Article 59(1) UPCA require plausible evidence, specific controlled evidence, confidentiality, and proportionality.
Granted European patents benefit from a validity presumption unless a clear-cut case of invalidity is demonstrated at this stage.
Physical samples may be ordered for necessary testing, but requests are strictly limited by proportionality principles.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案明确了UPC在证据保全阶段的审查标准，强调了对已授权专利有效性的尊重及比例原则的适用。实务中，申请人需确保证据请求的具体性与必要性，避免过度索取。对于依赖物理测试认定侵权的案件，提前规划测试方案并论证样本获取的必要性至关重要。
report_items.insight_en: This decision reinforces the structured approach of the UPC towards pre-trial evidence gathering, balancing the rights holder's need to verify infringement against the defendant's interest in avoiding disproportionate burdens. It confirms that while patent validity is presumed, the specificity and necessity of requested evidence remain subject to rigorous judicial scrutiny. For practitioners, the ruling highlights th...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性: 明确UPC证据保全门槛，指导专利维权策略
Practice note/实务观察: 论证样本获取必要性时需结合具体测试需求与比例原则
What to monitor/后续观察: 关注UPC对“明显无效”标准的进一步界定及…
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Clarifies the high threshold for obtaining evidence production orders, requiring precise justification of necessity and proportionality.
Practice note: When seeking physical samples for test-dependent infringement, limit requests to the minimum viable set to satisfy proportionality requirements.
What to monitor: How the UPC further defines 'clear-cut' invalidity cases that might displace the presumption of validity during evidence stages.

report_items.title_zh: CJEU需裁定：前药是否可独立获得SPC保护？
report_items.title_en: CJEU Asked to Rule on SPC Eligibility for Pro-Drugs of Previously Approved Actives
report_items.title: Pro = Active? CJEU Asked To Decide
report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟法院（CJEU）受理新案件（C-794/25），需裁定已获批活性成分的前药能否独立获得欧盟SPC保护。背景涉及武田的LDX（右旋苯丙胺前药），其虽获新药上市许可，但母体药物DEX早已上市。争议焦点在于前药是否被视为“不同”的活性物质，该裁决将澄清行业规则并解决相关诉讼。
report_items.summary_en: The Court of Justice of the European Union (CJEU) has received a new referral (Case C-794/25) concerning whether an approved pro-drug of a previously authorized active pharmaceutical ingredient qualifies for Supplementary Protection Certificate (SPC) protection independently. The case centers on lisdexamfetamine (LDX), a pro-drug of dexamphetamine (DEX). Although DEX is a long-established generic, LDX was granted marketing authorization as a New Active Substance due to its distinct safety and efficacy profile. The CJEU must determine if such derivatives constitute separate active substances un...
core_points_zh: CJEU被要求裁定已获批活性成分的前药在欧盟是否可独立获得SPC保护
案件背景涉及武田的LDX及其母体药物DEX，争议在于前药是否构成不同的活性物质
裁决结果旨在为制药行业提供法律确定性，并解决该领域的现有诉讼争议
core_points_en: CJEU referral C-794/25 addresses whether pro-drugs of known actives can secure independent SPC protection in the EU.
Lisdexamfetamine was authorized as a New Active Substance despite being a metabolic derivative of older drug dexamphetamine.
The ruling will interpret Article 10.2.b of the Medicinal Products Directive regarding significant differences in safety or efficacy.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案核心在于解释《药品指令》中关于活性物质衍生的定义。若CJEU认定前药可独立获SPC，将显著延长创新药的市场独占期；反之则可能限制基于已知分子结构的改良型创新的专利策略。企业需密切关注判决对SPC申请策略的影响。

Under the German Trademark Act (MarkenG), applications file...

The judgment confirms that restrictions on online channels within selective distribution systems are not automatically illegal. While this clarifies the treatment of channel restrictions, it does not signal leniency towards hard...

However, rights holders must distinguish these legitimate quality controls from hardcore anti-competitive practices. Maintaining transparent...
insight_points_zh: 制定基于品牌定位的客观分销标准，避免 blanket ban 线上销售
严禁转售价格维持等核心限制，完善合规文档以应对反垄断审查

weekly_report.executive_line_en: European IP trends show judicial refinement in UPC procedures and a strategic pivot from aggressive SEP litigation toward FRAND compliance and negotiated settlements.
weekly_report.summary_en: The European intellectual property landscape is characterized by two concurrent developments: increased procedural precision within the Unified Patent Court (UPC) and a significant shift in Standard Essential Patent (SEP) enforcement strategies. The UPC Local Division in The Hague established clear, cumulative criteria for evidence preservation orders, enhancing legal predictability for rights holders. Simultaneously, major SEP holders, including Nokia and Huawei, have moved away from broad infringement campaigns toward resolving licensing terms through negotiation and specific jurisdictional rate-setting proceedings, particularly in the UK. This transition underscores the growing importance of UK court decisions in establishing global FRAND benchmarks. Beyond litigation, regulatory environments are tightening; Switzerland has introduced mandatory prior-art searches and optional substantive examination for patents, while the EU continues to align IP standards with Western Balkan partners. These institutional and judicial shifts require companies to refine their cross-border licensing strategies, prioritize compliance documentation, and leverage alternative dispute resolution mechan...

daily_audio_latest.headline_zh: UPC诉讼策略调整与SEP和解潮
daily_audio_latest.headline_en: SEP Settlements Rise as UPC ADR Mechanisms Expand and UK Clarifies Distribution Rules
daily_audio_latest.summary_zh: 过去48小时，欧洲IP战局呈现两大趋势：一是标准必要专利（SEP）领域出现显著和解信号，诺基亚撤回对吉利诉讼并达成全球和解，华为将焦点集中于英国高等法院的FRAND费率裁定；二是统一专利法院（UPC）运营深化，发布2025年度回顾并明确替代性争议解决（ADR）机制运作细节。此外，EPO维持ISO认证保障服务稳定性，英国上诉法院就选择性分销在线限制提供新指引。整体态势表明，权利人更倾向于通过高效程序和商业谈判解决纠纷，而非长期缠斗。
daily_audio_latest.summary_en: Over the past 48 hours, the European IP landscape has been defined by two major trends. First, Standard Essential Patent (SEP) holders, including Nokia and Huawei, have shifted strategies away from widespread infringement actions toward global settlements and focused FRAND rate determinations in the UK High Court. This indicates a preference for precise economic outcomes over prolonged legal battles. Second, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) is deepening its operational capabilities, highlighted by the release of its 2025 Annual Review and the formalization of Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR) mechanisms through the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC). Additionally, the EPO maintained its ISO certifications, ensuring service stability, while the UK Court of Appeal provided new guidance on online restrictions within selective distribution systems. These developments collectively suggest that rights holders are increasingly prioritizing efficient procedural pathways and commercial negotiations to resolve disputes, rather than engaging in long-term adversarial litigation.

topics.headline_en: UPC Case Law Evolution and PMAC ADR Mechanism Launch
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，统一专利法院（UPC）发布年报并正式启用替代性争议解决机构（PMAC），提供调解仲裁新路径。司法实践方面，杜塞尔多夫等分院在等同原则、权利要求解释及临时禁令举证上确立严格标准，强调单一产品特征比对。同时，上诉程序对期限合规与费用担保审查趋严。企业需结合PMAC低成本解纷优势，优化欧洲专利布局与应诉策略，警惕功能性限定带来的直接侵权风险。
key_points: PMAC程序规则获批且系统上线，为SEP/FRAND纠纷提供独立于诉讼的调解仲裁渠道，降低维权成本。
地方法院强化等同侵权与权利要求解释的严格性，要求单一器具内实现所有特征，单独销售组件亦可能构成直接侵权。
上诉法院严守程序期限与证据保全门槛，明确登录系统不视为应诉，但逾期提交将导致权利丧失或驳回。
actions: 评估利用PMAC进行早期调解或仲裁的可能性，以较低成本解决潜在专利纠纷，特别是涉及标准必要专利时。
全面排查出口欧洲的硬件产品，针对功能性限定权利要求进行FTO分析，避免单独销售配件引发直接侵权诉讼。
建立严格的UPC诉讼期限双重核查机制，并在收到侵权通知后立即书面表达许可意愿，以保留FRAND抗辩权。
watchlist: 关注UPC主要分部早期判例的累积效应，预判未来专利法解释趋势，避免过度依赖单一法庭。
监测马耳他等非参与国对单一专利效力的影响，规划传统验证与单一专利的组合保护策略。
留意欧洲层面是否就PMAC运作及撤诉退费新规出台更明确的配套指引或官方口径。
topics.summary_en: In the first half of 2026, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) released its annual report and formally activated the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC), establishing new pathways for alternative dispute resolution. Judicial practice has seen Local Divisions in Düsseldorf and other venues set strict standards for equivalence infringement, claim construction, and evidentiary burdens for provisional measures. Courts emphasize that all features of a single product claim must be realized within one appliance, while standalone components may still constitute direct infringement under functional language. Concurrently, the Court of Appeal has tightened scrutiny regarding procedural deadlines and security for costs. Rights holders should integrate PMAC’s cost-effective mediation options into their European enforcement strategies. Furthermore, companies must carefully assess freedom-to-ope...
key_points_en: The PMAC procedural rules were approved and its case management system launched, providing an independent mediation and arbitration channel for SEP/FRAND and cross-border disputes...
Local Divisions reinforced strict interpretations of equivalence and claim construction, requiring all features of a single product claim to be present in one appliance, while noti...
The Court of Appeal strictly enforced procedural timelines and evidence preservation thresholds, clarifying that passive login to the case management system does not constitute ent...
actions_en: Evaluate the strategic use of PMAC for early-stage mediation or arbitration to resolve potential patent disputes efficiently, particularly in complex SEP/FRAND negotiations.
Conduct comprehensive freedom-to-operate analyses for hardware products exported to Europe, specifically addressing functional claim limitations to avoid direct infringement risks...
Implement rigorous dual-check mechanisms for UPC litigation deadlines and promptly express licensing willingness upon receiving infringement notices to preserve FRAND defense right...
watchlist_en: Monitor the cumulative effect of early decisions from major UPC divisions to anticipate future trends in patent law interpretation and avoid over-reliance on specific judicial foru...
Track the impact of non-participating states like Malta on unitary patent validity to plan combined protection strategies using both traditional validation and unitary patents.
Observe whether European authorities issue further official guidance or operational clarifications regarding PMAC procedures and updated fee reimbursement rules for withdrawals.

topics.headline_zh: 欧洲SEP：英国定费率，UPC强禁令
topics.headline_en: UK Sets Global FRAND Rates as UPC Strengthens Injunctions
topics.summary_zh: 2025-2026年欧洲SEP格局剧变。英国法院确立全球FRAND费率裁定权（如三星诉中兴案），并倾向仲裁解决争议；统一专利法院（UPC）积极签发反禁诉令及临时禁令，强化对NPE及实施者的威慑。同时，欧盟修订TTBER明确许可合规指引。中国企业面临管辖权冲突与高额许可费双重压力，需加速从诉讼对抗转向商业和解与合规布局。
key_points: 英国司法主导：高等法院裁定巨额全球交叉许可费率（3.92亿美元），上诉法院确认仲裁条款可排除法院管辖，确立“合同化”FRAND趋势。
UPC攻势升级：曼海姆等分部频繁签发反禁诉令（AASI）对抗中国法院临时许可申请，并简化程序快速裁决侵权与无效。
监管与生态演变：欧盟新TTBER生效规范专利池与集体谈判；Avanci/Sisvel专利池渗透加速，七家中国车企已签署车联网许可。
actions: 建立“英-欧-中”多法域协同应诉机制，针对UPC禁令风险提前准备无效证据，避免单一市场被动。
重新评估许可策略，积极参与Sisvel/Avanci等专利池谈判，利用新TTBER指南优化反垄断合规与集体议价能力。
在许可协议中审慎加入仲裁条款，利用英国判例将费率争议导向仲裁，规避英国法院的高额全球费率裁定风险。
watchlist: 英国最高法院关于特斯拉/InterDigital案的最终裁决，及其对全球FRAND管辖权的进一步界定。
欧盟委员会SEP透明度与必要性审查细则落地情况，以及其对现有许可模式的潜在冲击。
UPC在ZTE诉三星等案中是否形成统一的FRAND费率计算方法论，以缓解司法碎片化问题。

topics.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

topics.summary_en: The European standard-essential patent landscape is undergoing significant transformation in 2025 and 2026. UK courts have established authority to determine global FRAND rates for cross-licenses, while increasingly favoring arbitration to resolve disputes. Concurrently, the Unified Patent Court is actively issuing anti-anti-suit injunctions and temporary bans, strengthening deterrence against non-practicing entities and implementers who delay negotiations. Regulatory frameworks are also evolving, with the EU revising the Technology Transfer Block Exemption Regulation to provide clearer licensing compliance guidelines. Organizations face heightened risks from jurisdictional conflicts and elevated royalty demands. Strategic priorities include shifting from pure litigation confrontation toward commercial settlement and robust compliance structures. Companies must navigate complex interacti...
key_points_en: UK judicial leadership: The High Court determined substantial global cross-licence rates, while appellate rulings confirm that arbitration clauses can exclude court jurisdiction, e...
UPC enforcement escalation: Local divisions frequently issue anti-anti-suit injunctions to counter foreign interim licence applications, streamlining procedures for rapid infringem...
Regulatory and ecosystem shifts: The revised EU Technology Transfer Block Exemption Regulation governs patent pools and collective bargaining, accelerating adoption of platforms li...
actions_en: Establish coordinated multi-jurisdictional response mechanisms targeting UPC injunction risks by preparing invalidity evidence early to avoid passive positioning in single markets.
Reassess licensing strategies by actively engaging with major patent pool negotiations and utilizing updated regulatory guidelines to optimize antitrust compliance and collective b...
Carefully incorporate arbitration clauses into licensing agreements to direct rate disputes away from high-stakes global rate determinations by national courts, leveraging recent p...
watchlist_en: Final rulings on global FRAND jurisdiction scope and their impact on international licensing standards.
Implementation details of transparency and essentiality review rules and their potential disruption of existing licensing models.
Development of unified FRAND rate calculation methodologies within the UPC to reduce judicial fragmentation and legal uncertainty.

topics.headline_en: EUIPO Finance Initiatives and Evolving Trademark Case Law Trends
topics.summary_zh: 2026年Q2，EUIPO联合EIF解锁IP融资机制，助力中小企业降低门槛。司法层面，普通法院强化声誉评估，CJEU明确异议权利存续要件，德国严打AI恶意抢注。同时，欧盟手工艺GI首案落地，体系加速适应AI挑战。企业需把握融资红利，优化注册策略以应对日益严格的审查与维权环境。
key_points: EUIPO联手EIF推出IP支持型融资，配合SME基金显著降低中国品牌进入欧盟的知识产权成本与资金压力。
司法裁判趋严：普通法院要求全局评估商标关联，CJEU裁定异议期间在先权利必须持续有效，德国警示AI恶意抢注风险。
制度创新与合规：利摩日瓷器获首个欧盟手工艺地理标志保护，官方强调IP体系需适应AI生成内容及在线执法新挑战。
actions: 积极申请EUIPO中小企业基金补贴，利用欧盟商标覆盖27国优势制定高性价比扩张方案。
建立动态权利监控机制，确保异议期权利稳定；在德国等市场尽早注册并留存使用证据，防范AI恶意抢注。
规范知识产权资产管理，探索IP质押融资可行性；针对纯技术功能动态商标规避注册，注重品牌战略资产属性。
watchlist: 关注EUIPO关于判例法指导IP决策的具体配套安排及AI生成内容执法细则。
追踪西巴尔干地区知识产权标准对齐进程，评估新兴市场准入机会。
监测欧盟手工业地理标志系统后续注册案例及对相关行业的影响。
topics.summary_en: In Q2 2026, the EUIPO partnered with the European Investment Fund to facilitate access to intellectual property-backed financing, aiming to support innovative companies by leveraging intangible assets. Concurrently, judicial trends indicate stricter scrutiny in trademark disputes. The General Court emphasized comprehensive reputation assessments, while the CJEU clarified that earlier rights must remain valid throughout opposition proceedings. Additionally, German authorities highlighted risks associated with bad-faith filings facilitated by AI tools. The first craft geographical indication, Porcelaine de Limoges, was registered under the new EU system, signaling expanded protection for non-agricultural goods. These developments underscore the need for robust IP strategies that integrate financial planning with rigorous compliance and enforcement measures to navigate the evolving regulato...
key_points_en: The EUIPO and EIF partnership introduces mechanisms for IP-backed finance, offering potential capital access for firms holding significant trademark and patent portfolios.
Judicial precedents require holistic evidence of mark reputation and mandate that earlier rights remain enforceable at the time of final EUIPO decisions in opposition cases.
Authorities are addressing emerging challenges, including AI-driven bad-faith filings and the integration of craft geographical indications into the EU protection framework.
actions_en: Evaluate eligibility for EUIPO SME funding schemes and consider EU-wide trademark registrations to maximize cost-efficiency and territorial coverage.
Implement dynamic monitoring systems to ensure the continuous validity of prior rights during oppositions and secure early registration to mitigate bad-faith risks.
watchlist_en: Monitor EUIPO publications regarding case law guidance and specific enforcement protocols for AI-generated content.
Track regulatory alignment efforts in the Western Balkans to anticipate future market integration and enforcement standards.
Observe subsequent registrations under the new craft and industrial geographical indications system to understand sector-specific impacts.

topics.headline_en: UKIPO Warns of Risks from Counterfeit Ink and Toner Cartridges
topics.summary_zh: 2026年3月，英国知识产权局（UKIPO）发布警示，指出假冒碳粉等耗材不仅造成严重设备损坏，且造假者往往免责不赔。全球假冒贸易额高达4670亿美元，常与有组织犯罪网络关联。该警示强调品牌保护紧迫性，要求供应链各环节强化合规与溯源，以应对日益严峻的知识产权侵权风险及潜在的法律连带责任。
key_points: 假冒耗材致损严重且造假者通常免责不赔偿
全球假冒贸易达4670亿美元并关联有组织犯罪
出口企业需建立合规溯源体系防范供应链指控
actions: 立即审查并完善产品防伪标识与全链路溯源机制
加强对海外供应商的背景尽调，规避不明来源采购
评估现有保险覆盖范围，针对假冒侵权风险进行补充
watchlist: 欧盟及英国后续针对打印耗材领域的专项执法行动
关于假冒产品造成第三方损害的责任认定司法判例
主要电商平台对低价耗材上架审核标准的更新动态
topics.topic_name_zh: 假冒执法 / 品牌保护
topics.summary_en: In March 2026, the UK Intellectual Property Office issued a warning regarding counterfeit ink and toner cartridges, highlighting severe operational risks for businesses. The agency cited an OECD/EUIPO report estimating global counterfeiting trade at USD 467 billion, noting strong links to organized crime networks. Counterfeit consumables often cause significant equipment damage, yet manufacturers typically bear no liability for such defects. Online marketplaces frequently facilitate these sales through third-party sellers. This alert underscores the urgency of robust brand protection strategies. Companies must strengthen compliance and traceability across supply chains to mitigate intellectual property infringement risks and potential legal liabilities associated with defective counterfeit goods entering commercial channels.
key_points_en: Counterfeit print consumables cause serious operational issues and lack manufacturer liability for resulting damages.
Global counterfeit trade is valued at approximately USD 467 billion with established links to organized crime networks.
Online third-party sellers frequently offer counterfeit goods, requiring robust procurement systems to prevent infiltration.
actions_en: Review procurement contracts to ensure supplier warranties explicitly cover equipment damage from defective consumables.
Implement visual and functional verification steps for high-volume consumable purchases to distinguish genuine from fake items.
Conduct enhanced due diligence on overseas suppliers to avoid sourcing products from unknown or unverified origins.
watchlist_en: Subsequent targeted enforcement actions by EU and UK authorities in the printing consumables sector.
Judicial precedents concerning liability determination for third-party damages caused by counterfeit products.
